name: codevitals
description: CTO-grade diagnostic skills for Claude Code. A comprehensive suite of codebase health checks covering architecture, security, performance, testing, DevOps, and developer experience.

plugins.name: cto-audit
plugins.description: Comprehensive CTO-level technical audit of any codebase

plugins.name: infosec-audit
plugins.description: Deep application security audit — OWASP Top 10, secrets, auth, dependencies

plugins.name: soc2-gdpr-readiness
plugins.description: SOC 2 and GDPR compliance readiness assessment for codebases

plugins.name: pentest-planner
plugins.description: Attack surface analysis and penetration test planning

plugins.name: api-design-review
plugins.description: REST and GraphQL API design quality review

plugins.name: database-health-check
plugins.description: Database schema, query, indexing, and migration health check

plugins.name: microservices-readiness
plugins.description: Evaluate monolith decomposition readiness and service boundary design

plugins.name: test-suite-audit
plugins.description: Test coverage, quality, and reliability audit with a concrete backlog

plugins.name: cicd-pipeline-review
plugins.description: CI/CD pipeline efficiency, safety, and maturity review

plugins.name: dependency-health-check
plugins.description: Dependency freshness, risk scoring, license compliance, and supply chain audit

plugins.name: performance-audit
plugins.description: Application performance audit — bundle size, queries, caching, Core Web Vitals

plugins.name: scalability-assessment
plugins.description: Horizontal scaling readiness, bottleneck identification, and capacity planning

plugins.name: onboarding-scorecard
plugins.description: Developer onboarding and experience scorecard — clone to running in how long?

plugins.name: tech-debt-prioritiser
plugins.description: Scan, score, and prioritise technical debt into a sprint-ready backlog

plugins.name: incident-readiness-review
plugins.description: Monitoring, alerting, observability, and incident response readiness review

plugins.name: container-audit
plugins.description: Dockerfile, Docker Compose, and container security best practices audit
